title: What happened to the Kharijites
description: (According to) Hisham b. Muhammad94-Abu Mikhnaf9'-alNadr b. $alih b. Habib-Jarir b. Malik b. Zuhayr b. Jadhimah al-'Absi-Ubayy b. 'Umirah al-'Absi: Hayyan b. Zabyan" alSulami held the view of the Kharijites and was among the wounded who were carried from the battlefield at al-Nahrawin. 'Ali included him among the four hundred of those who were wounded at the Battle of al-Nahr whom he forgave. Hayyan stayed with his family and clan, waiting for about a sent to Iraq by the caliph ' Umar as judge in 19(640). See Ibn Sa'd, Tabagat, VI, 90-100. 93.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
